MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALBERT FANG'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. (CODE CIV. PROC. 428.50(C).) PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT DEFENDANT IS ACTING IN BAD FAITH OR HAS UNDULY DELAYED TO THEIR PREJUDICE. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Set For Trial On Feb-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against The City And County Of San Francisco, The San Francisco Department Of Public Works, The San Francisco Department Of Public Works Bureau Of Urban Forestry
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ieenor W. Lin, esq. (408-535-0870) of Borton Petrini LLP for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALBERT FANG's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against The City And County Of San Francisco, The San Francisco Department Of Public Works, The San Francisco Department Of Public Works Bureau Of Urban Forestry, and ROES 1-25:

Defendant Albert Fang's motion for leave to file cross-complaint is granted. (Code Civ. Proc. 428.50(c).) Plaintiffs have not shown that Defendant is acting in bad faith or has unduly delayed to their prejudice.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Set For Trial On Jan-27-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
